caBundle.description: The PEM encoded CA bundle for TLS verification

type.description:
Set the TLS method to use. Supported values:
- `metrics-server` : Metrics-server will generate a self-signed certificate
- `helm`           : Helm will generate a self-signed certificate
- `cert-manager`   : Use cert-manager.io to create and maintain the certificate
- `existingSecret` : Reuse an existing secret. No new secret will be created

name.description:
The name of the service account to use.
If not set and create is true, a name is generated using the fullname template

- `helm`           : Helm will generate a self-signed certificate
- `cert-manager`   : Use cert-manager.io to create and maintain the certificate
- `existingSecret` : Reuse an existing secret. No new secret will be created

annotations.description: Annotations to add to the API service

insecureSkipTLSVerify.description: Specifies whether to skip TLS verification

annotations.description: Annotations to add to the API service

caBundle.description: The PEM encoded CA bundle for TLS verification

create.description:
Specifies if the v1beta1.metrics.k8s.io API service should be created.
You typically want this enabled! If you disable API service creation you have to
manage it outside of this chart for e.g horizontal pod autoscaling to
work with this release.

insecureSkipTLSVerify.description: Specifies whether to skip TLS verification

deploymentAnnotations.description: Annotations to add to the deployment

enabled.description:
Specifies if metrics-server should be started in hostNetwork mode.
You would require this enabled if you use alternate overlay networking for pods and
API server unable to communicate with metrics-server. As an example, this is required
if you use Weave network on EKS

tag.description: Overrides the image tag whose default is v{{ .Chart.AppVersion }}

create.description: Specifies whether RBAC resources should be created

pspEnabled.description: Note: PodSecurityPolicy will not be created when Kubernetes version is 1.25 or later.

labels.description:
Add these labels to have metrics-server show up in `kubectl cluster-info`
kubernetes.io/cluster-service: "true"
kubernetes.io/name: "Metrics-server"

annotations.description: Annotations to add to the service account

name.description:
The name of the service account to use.
If not set and create is true, a name is generated using the fullname template

secrets.description:
The list of secrets mountable by this service account.
See https://kubernetes.io/docs/reference/labels-annotations-taints/#enforce-mountable-secrets

duration.description:
Set the requested duration (i.e. lifetime) of the Certificate.
See https://cert-manager.io/docs/reference/api-docs/#cert-manager.io/v1.CertificateSpec

renewBefore.description:
How long before the currently issued certificate’s expiry cert-manager should renew the certificate.
See https://cert-manager.io/docs/reference/api-docs/#cert-manager.io/v1.CertificateSpec

kind.description: Kind of the existing cert-manager issuer

name.description: Name of the existing cert-manager issuer
Name of the existing Secret to use for TLS

addInjectorAnnotations.description:
Automatically add the cert-manager.io/inject-ca-from annotation to the APIService resource.
See https://cert-manager.io/docs/concepts/ca-injector
